issues.description: Missing first passive effect: 'If you have 4 or more Life cards, give this Leader −1000 power.' This is a permanent passive condition, not an activated ability.
Trigger should be 'Activated' (correct) but condition is incomplete. Condition should check for Character with cost 8 or more on board, not just HasCardOnBoard.
Condition type 'HasCardOnBoard' is too generic. Should specify checking for Character with cost ≥8. Current DSL does not capture the cost requirement.
[DON!! x1] is a one-time activated ability, not EndOfTurn. Duration should be 'Permanent' or omitted for immediate single application.
